//: VALIDATION-ONLY toolchain for AI-DLC's own browser/app visual-QA tools. This package.json and its lockfile are used by THIS repo's tests to install a pinned Playwright + axe + image-diff toolchain so the smoke tests can run against a real chromium. CONSUMERS DO NOT GET THIS: it is NOT shipped by the installer payload — product/scripts/ must be fenced out of what `npx @kabaka/ai-dlc init/update` writes. Consumers install their OWN pinned toolchain (the tools resolve these modules from the consumer repo's node_modules). All versions are EXACT-PINNED (no ^/~) so our validation is reproducible.
name: @ai-dlc/visual-qa-validation
description: Validation-only pinned toolchain for AI-DLC visual-QA browser/app tools. Not shipped to consumers.
